records.notes: BFS LSE 2022 P25 band for ISCO-2512. Junior/early-career proxy.

Netherlands junior software developers. P25 earnings band from SES 2022. NL has competitive entry-level salaries vs EU peers.
Netherlands software developers from SES 2022. Strong tech sector with above-EU-average pay. Amsterdam premium over national average is modest (5–10% for tech roles).
Senior software developers Netherlands. Upper quartile. International tech companies (ASML, Booking.com, Adyen, TomTom) push upper end.

Amsterdam mid-level software developers. ~9% premium over national median based on CBS regional earnings differential. International tech employer concentration (Booking.com, Adyen, TomTom, Uber EU HQ) inflates top end.
ISCO 1221 digital/tech management — closest Eurostat mapping to product manager for Netherlands. Includes tech sector management at Booking.com, Adyen, TomTom.
Data analyst / database professionals Netherlands. Strong data science market, particularly in fintech and e-commerce. Maps to data-analyst and data-scientist.

Marketing professionals Netherlands. ISCO 2431. Amsterdam has a high density of digital marketing roles (Booking.com, TikTok EU, etc.). Maps to marketing-manager, performance-marketing-manager, growth-manager.
Ireland junior software developers. P25 earnings band. Boosted by multinational presence — entry-level at FAANG Dublin subsidiaries is above this range.
Ireland (Dublin is dominant market). Boosted by multinational tech presence. Dublin is effectively country-level for tech roles.
Senior software developers Ireland. Upper quartile. Heavy multinational presence means senior SWE in Dublin can command significantly above EU peers. Does not include equity.
Dublin city mid-level software developers. Consistent with Eurostat national figure — Dublin = ~Ireland for tech. Levels.fyi Dublin data cross-checked.
ISCO 1221 tech management — closest Eurostat mapping to product manager for Ireland. Multinational HQ presence inflates PM salaries significantly above EU peers.
Data analyst / database professionals Ireland. Strong data market in Dublin (FAANG data teams). Maps to data-analyst, data-scientist.
Marketing professionals Ireland. Many multinational EMEA marketing functions based in Dublin (Google, Meta, LinkedIn). Wide range due to mix of local and EMEA-scope roles.
Anforderungsniveau 2 = qualified professional, early stage. Gross annual earnings for software developers and programmers.
Anforderungsniveau 3 = specialist level. Mid-career software developers. Consistent with Eurostat SES 2022 Germany data.
Anforderungsniveau 4 = expert level. Senior software developers and architects.

Berlin federal state data from VSE. Berlin is slightly below the German national average for tech roles (lower cost of living, startup-heavy market). Approximately 4-5% below national median for software developers.
IT consultants and analysts. Maps to business-analyst and data-analyst roles. Also used for product-manager normalization in absence of a more specific code.
Commercial management and business operations — maps to marketing-manager, sales-manager, operations-manager. Wide range; manager-level roles are at upper end.
Data analysts / BI analysts Germany. KldB 4312 data processing specialists. Maps to data-analyst. Consistent with Eurostat ISCO 2529 Germany figure.
Junior data analysts Germany. KldB Anforderungsniveau 2 (qualified professional, early stage).
Senior data analysts / data scientists Germany. Anforderungsniveau 4 (expert level). Includes machine learning and AI engineering roles.
IT coordinators and organisers Germany. KldB 4313. Maps to product-manager and it-project-manager roles. Aligned with Eurostat ISCO 1221 Germany figure.
Senior product managers / IT directors Germany. Upper quartile. Major tech companies (SAP, Siemens Digital, Deutsche Telekom, BMW Tech) push upper range.
Junior marketing / commercial management Germany. KldB 1412 Anforderungsniveau 2.
Senior marketing managers and sales directors Germany. Anforderungsniveau 4. Maps to marketing-manager, sales-manager at manager/director level.
Business consulting and organisation Germany. Maps to finance-analyst and business-analyst. KldB 7311.
HR and people management professionals Germany. KldB 7312. Maps to hr-manager, people-ops roles.
Graphic and communication designers Germany. KldB 5412. Maps to designer (UX/UI/product design). Tech-focused UX designers at digital companies tend toward upper end.
Data analysts, Berlin federal state. Slightly below national median for data roles — Berlin startup market pays less than Munich/Frankfurt for non-SWE roles.
Product managers / IT coordinators, Berlin. Startup-heavy market — mix of well-funded scaleups (Zalando, Delivery Hero, N26, HelloFresh) and early-stage companies. Broad range.
Germany software developers from SES 2022. Eurostat ISCO 2512. Cross-checked with Destatis VSE 2022 data. Median gross annual earnings. P25-P75 range shown.
Netherlands software developers from SES 2022. Strong tech sector with above-EU-average pay. Amsterdam premium over national average is modest (5–10% for tech roles).
Spain software developers from SES 2022. Spain IT salaries are significantly lower than northern European peers. Madrid and Barcelona are 10-20% above national median.
France software developers from SES 2022. Paris is approximately 15-20% above national median for tech roles.
Ireland (Dublin is dominant market). Boosted by multinational tech presence. Dublin is effectively country-level for tech roles.

records.notes: Closest Eurostat mapping to product manager for Germany. ISCO 1221 covers digital/tech management roles.
Closest Eurostat mapping to product manager for Spain. ISCO 1221 covers digital/tech management roles. Spain PM salaries are significantly below northern EU peers.
Closest Eurostat mapping to product manager for Netherlands. ISCO 1221 covers digital/tech management roles. Strong signal from Booking.com, Adyen, TomTom.
Pan-EU aggregate for data analyst/database professional roles. Wide range due to country variation. Used as Europe-fallback baseline only.

records.role_raw: Desarrolladores y analistas de software y multimedia
records.notes: Entry-level software developers and analysts, Spain national. P25 band. Spain has significantly lower tech salaries than northern EU peers.

records.role_raw: Desarrolladores y analistas de software y multimedia
records.notes: Mid-level software developers, Spain national median. Consistent with Eurostat SES 2022 Spain data.

records.role_raw: Desarrolladores y analistas de software y multimedia
records.notes: Senior software developers Spain. Upper quartile and above. Includes senior engineers at multinationals.

records.role_raw: Desarrolladores y analistas de software y multimedia
records.notes: Madrid (Comunidad de Madrid) regional data. Madrid is approximately 12% above Spain national median for tech roles.

records.role_raw: Desarrolladores y analistas de software y multimedia
records.notes: Barcelona (Cataluña) regional data. Barcelona slightly below Madrid but above Spain national average for tech roles.

records.role_raw: Profesionales en organización de empresas y marketing
records.notes: Business organization and marketing professionals, Spain. Maps to marketing-manager, sales-manager, operations-manager roles.

records.role_raw: Analistas y diseñadores de sistemas informáticos
records.notes: Junior IT analysts and systems designers, Spain national. Maps to data-analyst, business-analyst.

records.role_raw: Analistas y diseñadores de sistemas informáticos
records.notes: Mid-level IT analysts and systems designers Spain. Maps to data-analyst, business-analyst, product-manager. Lower than northern EU by 40-50%.

records.role_raw: Analistas y diseñadores de sistemas informáticos (Senior)
records.notes: Senior IT analysts Spain. Upper quartile. Multinationals and consultancies (Accenture, Capgemini, Indra) at upper end.

records.role_raw: Analistas y diseñadores de sistemas informáticos, Madrid
records.notes: Madrid IT analysts mid-level. Comunidad de Madrid ~14% premium over national for tech analyst roles. Large consulting and fintech presence (Santander, BBVA, Telefónica tech units).

records.role_raw: Analistas y diseñadores de sistemas informáticos, Barcelona
records.notes: Barcelona IT analysts mid-level. Cataluña ~11% premium over national for tech analyst roles. Strong startup ecosystem (Factorial, Glovo, Wallapop) alongside traditional consulting.

records.role_raw: Profesionales en organización de empresas y marketing (Junior)
records.notes: Junior marketing professionals Spain. Maps to marketing-manager, growth-manager at early career level.

records.role_raw: Profesionales en organización de empresas y marketing (Senior)
records.notes: Senior marketing professionals Spain. Upper quartile. Head of marketing / VP Marketing at Spanish scale-ups and multinationals.

records.role_raw: Profesionales en organización de empresas y marketing, Madrid
records.notes: Marketing professionals Madrid. ~11% above Spain national median for this role family. Tech/startup marketing roles above this level.

records.role_raw: Desarrolladores y analistas de software y multimedia (Lead/Principal)
records.notes: Lead / principal software developers Spain. P90 earnings band. Remote-work-driven salary inflation has pushed this tier higher since 2022 — treat as conservative. Small sample at this level.
Design professionals Spain. CNO-343 covers graphic and product designers. UX/UI designers at tech companies skew above this range. Maps to designer.

records.role_raw: Directores y gerentes de producción y operaciones
records.notes: Product manager Spain national. Derived from ISCO 1221 production/operations managers in Eurostat SES 2022 for Spain. Spanish PM salaries significantly lower than northern EU. Remote work has increased effective rates for some roles since 2022.

records.role_raw: Directores y gerentes de producción y operaciones, Madrid
records.notes: Product manager Madrid. Comunidad de Madrid premium ~12% over national for management roles. Santander, BBVA, Telefónica, Cabify, Glovo tech PMs are representative. Multinational-adjacent roles at upper end.

records.role_raw: Directores y gerentes de producción y operaciones, Barcelona
records.notes: Product manager Barcelona. Cataluña premium ~8% over national for management roles. Factorial, Glovo, Wallapop, Typeform product team compensation. Barcelona tech ecosystem generally below Madrid for PM roles.
HR professionals Spain. CNO-242. Maps to hr-manager, people-ops. Lower than marketing-manager due to sectoral mix — tech HRBPs sit above this range.

Base salary only. Levels.fyi London mid-level SWE. Skewed toward larger tech companies. ONS ASHE data is more representative of the broad market.
Senior SWE London. Levels.fyi sample skews toward FAANG/large tech. Represents top-of-market, not broad market.
Berlin mid-level SWE. Levels.fyi shows higher than Destatis official data — due to sample bias toward tech companies. Used as upper-bound signal.
London PM. Levels.fyi sample skews toward tech companies paying above ONS median.
Amsterdam data scientist. Smaller sample than London/Berlin. Used as directional signal.
Dublin SWE. High due to multinational tech hub presence (Google, Meta, etc.).
Paris mid-level SWE. Levels.fyi Paris sample skewed toward larger tech (Doctolib, BlaBlaCar, Leboncoin, Criteo, FAANG Paris). Above broad market median.
Senior SWE Paris. Upper end driven by FAANG EU offices. Represents top-of-market, not broad market.
Senior SWE Dublin. Very high due to FAANG HQ presence (Google, Meta, LinkedIn, Apple). Base salary only — total comp with RSUs significantly higher. Represents top-of-market.
Berlin PM mid-level. Zalando, Delivery Hero, N26, HelloFresh are representative employers. Levels.fyi skews toward funded scaleups.
Senior PM London. Levels.fyi sample skews toward FAANG and Tier-1 tech (Monzo, Revolut, Wise, Deliveroo). Broad market senior PM is lower.
London data scientist mid-level. Strong fintech and adtech signal. Levels.fyi sample skewed toward tech companies — broad market slightly lower.
Berlin data scientist mid-level. Zalando, N26, HelloFresh, Auto1 are representative employers. ML/AI roles at upper end.
London DevOps / SRE mid-level. Cloud and platform engineering in high demand. Fintech and scale-up market well represented.
Senior SRE / Staff DevOps London. Smaller sample at this level. Broad market senior DevOps is below this — Levels.fyi skews toward well-funded companies.
Berlin DevOps/SRE mid-level. Kubernetes and cloud-native roles in demand at scale-ups. Levels.fyi sample skews toward funded companies.
Barcelona SWE mid-level. Small Levels.fyi sample — mostly Factorial, Glovo, Wallapop, Typeform and international-remote-hiring companies. Spain market significantly below northern EU.
Senior SWE Amsterdam. High end driven by Booking.com, Adyen, TomTom, Uber EU tech. Broad market senior SWE in NL below this — this is top-of-market signal.
P25 band derived from ONS percentile spread for SOC 2136. Represents entry-to-early-career range.
P50 (median) for SOC 2136. This is the ONS published median gross annual pay for programmers and software development professionals. P25=£43k, P50=£52.9k, P75=£66k approximately.
Senior band derived from P75 and above spread. Includes senior/principal engineers.
London regional data. ONS Table 7 regional breakdown shows London median approximately 37% above UK national for this occupational group.
London senior/P75 band. Based on regional ONS spread with Levels.fyi cross-reference for senior tech roles in London.
SOC 2133 is the closest ONS occupational code to product manager. IT project/programme management overlaps substantially but is not identical to product management.
London regional data for SOC 2133. London premium approximately 35% above national median for this group.

records.role_raw: IT business analysts, architects and systems designers
records.notes: SOC 2134 covers IT business analysts, architects, and systems designers. Maps to business-analyst and devops-engineer roles.

records.role_raw: Business and related research professionals not elsewhere classified
records.notes: Maps to data analyst role. ONS does not have a dedicated 'data analyst' code — this is the closest equivalent covering quantitative analyst roles.
Marketing professionals UK median. Maps to marketing-manager role. Manager-level roles are above this median.
SOC 2137 web design and development. Maps to designer and frontend-developer roles. Note: this group has a wide range — pure designers at lower end, senior frontend developers at upper end.
SOC 2136 covers DevOps engineers alongside software developers. Junior proxy from P25 earnings band. ONS ASHE 2024.
SOC 2136 median — covers DevOps, SRE, platform engineering at all levels. ONS ASHE 2024 national median.
London DevOps / platform engineers from ONS ASHE 2024 regional tables. London premium vs national: ~25%.
SOC 2425 covers data analysts and data scientists. Used for both data-analyst and data-scientist role mapping. ONS ASHE 2024.
London data analysts/scientists from ONS ASHE 2024 regional tables. Strong signal from fintech (Monzo, Wise, Starling), tech (DeepMind, Palantir), and consulting sectors.
SOC 1134 — marketing and advertising directors/managers. Maps to marketing-manager, head of marketing. ONS ASHE 2024. Broad range due to company size and sector variation.
London marketing managers from ONS ASHE 2024 regional tables. Strong agency, FMCG, tech employer base inflates London premium.
SOC 1135 sales directors and managers. Maps to sales-manager. Base salary only — total comp for sales roles typically includes significant commission/bonus not captured here.
SOC 1136 HR managers and directors. Maps to hr-manager. Median reflects mid-level HRBP / people manager. ONS ASHE 2024.
SOC 2421 chartered accountants and finance professionals. Maps to finance-analyst. Broad sector mix — financial services and Big Four at upper end. ONS ASHE 2024.
London finance analysts. Concentration of financial services (Goldman, HSBC, Barclays, JP Morgan) significantly inflates the London premium for finance roles.
SOC 2137 web design and development professionals. Maps to designer (UX/UI/product design). Tech-focused product designers at scale-ups tend toward upper end. ONS ASHE 2024.
London UX/UI designers from ONS ASHE regional tables. Strong fintech, gaming, and agency presence. Product designers at top tech companies above this range.

records.role_raw: Business and financial project management professionals
records.notes: SOC 1162 operations managers. Maps to operations-manager. Wide range across sectors — tech ops managers tend toward upper end. ONS ASHE 2024.
SOC 3131 — closest ONS code to QA/test engineers. IT operations technicians includes test and QA. Lower than software developer median. ONS ASHE 2024.
SOC 2422 marketing associate professionals. Maps to growth-manager, performance-marketing-manager, content-manager, social-media-manager at mid level. ONS ASHE 2024.
Senior product managers / IT programme managers London. ONS ASHE 2024 P75 band. Represents experienced PMs at tech-forward employers.
